questions.question: Is WizNote shutting down?
questions.answer: Yes. After careful consideration, we have decided to discontinue the WizNote service. WizNote will officially cease all operations on May 22, 2026.

questions.question: When is the final shutdown date?
questions.answer: The final shutdown is scheduled for May 22, 2026, at 3:00 AM EST. After this time, the application and all associated services will no longer be accessible.

questions.question: Can I still use the app until the shutdown?
questions.answer: The platform is currently in read-only mode. You can still view, edit, and manage your existing notes, but new signups and the creation of new notes have been disabled.

questions.question: How do I export my data?
questions.answer: We strongly recommend exporting your data as soon as possible. You can download all your notes, quizzes, and flashcards in JSON format by going to Settings > Export All Data or by visiting the Sunset Information page. This will provide you with a permanent backup of your content.

questions.question: What happens to my data after May 22, 2026?
questions.answer: On the shutdown date, all WizNote servers will be decommissioned. In accordance with our privacy and security policies, all user data will be permanently and securely deleted. Data cannot be recovered after this date.

questions.question: What happens to my Premium subscription?
questions.answer: All active Premium subscriptions will remain active until their current billing cycle ends, providing access to Premium features during the sunset period. Automatic renewals and new subscriptions have been disabled.

questions.question: Who can I contact for help?
questions.answer: Our support team remains available to assist you with data exports or any questions you may have until the final shutdown. You can reach us at support@wiznote.app.

questions.question: What is WizNote?
questions.answer: WizNote is an AI-powered note-taking app designed to help students and professionals organize, summarize, and study their notes more effectively. Please note that the service is currently sunsetting and will shut down on May 22, 2026.

questions.question: How do I create my first note?
questions.answer: New note creation and account signups have been disabled as part of our sunset process. Existing users can still view and manage their current notes until May 22, 2026.

questions.question: Is WizNote free to use?
questions.answer: WizNote offered a free tier with essential features. However, new signups have been disabled. Existing users can continue to use their accounts until the final shutdown date.

questions.question: Do I need to create an account?
questions.answer: New account signups are no longer available. Existing account holders can continue to log in and access their data until May 22, 2026.

questions.question: How does AI transcription work?
questions.answer: WizNote uses advanced speech-to-text technology to automatically transcribe your audio recordings. This feature remains available for existing notes until the service shutdown.

questions.question: Can I create flashcards from my notes?
questions.answer: Yes, AI-generated flashcards remain available for existing notes. We recommend exporting any study materials you wish to keep before May 22, 2026.

questions.question: How do quizzes work?
questions.answer: Our AI analyzes your notes and automatically generates quiz questions. This feature remains functional for existing users until the final shutdown.

questions.question: Can I share notes with others?
questions.answer: Yes, note sharing remains active for existing notes. However, recipients will only be able to view shared notes until the platform shuts down on May 22, 2026.

questions.question: What is the AI summary feature?
questions.answer: AI summaries extract key points from your notes. This feature is available for your existing content during the sunset period.

questions.question: Can I organize notes with tags?
questions.answer: Yes, tag organization remains available to help you manage your notes before you export them.

questions.question: How do I upgrade to Premium?
questions.answer: New Premium subscriptions and renewals have been disabled as part of the service sunset. Active subscriptions will continue until their current billing period ends.

questions.question: Can I cancel my Premium subscription?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your Premium subscription from the Subscription Management page. Note that all automatic renewals have already been disabled.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We are no longer accepting new payments or subscriptions. Existing subscriptions are managed through Stripe until they expire.

questions.question: Will I lose my notes if I cancel Premium?
questions.answer: You will not lose your notes by canceling a subscription, but all user data will be permanently deleted when the service shuts down on May 22, 2026.

questions.question: How do I change my email or password?
questions.answer: You can still update your profile information in Settings, but we recommend focusing on exporting your data before the shutdown date.

questions.question: Can I delete my account?
questions.answer: Yes, you can delete your account at any time in Settings. Please note that all accounts will be automatically and securely deleted on May 22, 2026.

questions.question: Why is my audio not recording?
questions.answer: New audio recordings have been disabled as the platform is now in read-only mode. You can still listen to and view transcriptions for existing audio notes.

questions.question: My notes aren't syncing across devices. What should I do?
questions.answer: Syncing remains active for existing notes. If you encounter issues, please ensure you have an internet connection. We recommend exporting your data immediately if you're concerned about access.

questions.question: The app is running slowly. How can I fix this?
questions.answer: We are maintaining service stability during the sunset period. If you experience slowness, it may be due to high traffic as users export their data. Please try again or use the bulk export tool.

questions.question: I'm getting an error message. What should I do?
questions.answer: If you encounter errors during data export, please contact support@wiznote.app immediately so we can help you secure your data before the shutdown.

questions.question: Can I use WizNote offline?
questions.answer: WizNote requires an internet connection for most features. We recommend performing your final data exports while online to ensure all content is backed up.

questions.question: Which browsers are supported?
questions.answer: WizNote continues to support modern browsers until the final shutdown on May 22, 2026.

questions.question: Is my data secure?
questions.answer: Yes, your data remains encrypted and secure. Following the shutdown on May 22, 2026, all user data will be securely deleted to ensure your privacy.

questions.question: Who can see my notes?
questions.answer: Your notes remain private and are only accessible by you. Our team will not access your notes during the sunset process except for automated deletion on the shutdown date.

questions.question: What data do you collect?
questions.answer: We have stopped collecting new data. Existing data is held securely until the final deletion on May 22, 2026.

questions.question: Can I export my notes?
questions.answer: Yes, and we strongly encourage you to do so. Use the 'Export All Data' feature in Settings to download your content in JSON format before May 22, 2026.

questions.question: What happens to my notes if WizNote shuts down?
questions.answer: WizNote is scheduled to shut down on May 22, 2026. Please refer to the 'Service Update: WizNote Sunset' section at the top of this FAQ for detailed information on how to export your data and what to expect before the final shutdown.

questions.question: Are my notes backed up?
questions.answer: While we maintain server backups for stability, these will also be deleted on May 22, 2026. You are responsible for making your own local backup using our export tools before that date.

supportContact.description: Our support team is here to help you during the sunset period
